query:
CREATE TABLE `febraban` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `empresa` varchar(100),
  `mesano` int,
  `proposta` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `linha` int,
  `situacao` varchar(100),
  `operador` varchar(50),
  `solicitacao` varchar(20),
  `prazo` varchar(20),
  `troco` decimal(15,2),
  `financiado` decimal(15,2),
  `situacao2` varchar(100),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `febraban_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE INDEX `idx_febraban_proposta` ON `febraban` (`proposta`);
CREATE INDEX `idx_febraban_mesano` ON `febraban` (`mesano`);
CREATE INDEX `idx_febraban_empresa` ON `febraban` (`empresa`);
CREATE INDEX `idx_febraban_operador` ON `febraban` (`operador`);
